title: melicope confusa
intro: Melicope confusa, also known as the variable-leaved melicope, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues. Melicope confusa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
